arts.ttl: Inter Handed Double Personnel Boost Ahead of Parma Encounter
arts.sum: Serie A champions Inter have welcomed Carlos Augusto and Marko Arnautovic back to the squad ahead of Parma's visit on Friday. According to Sky Sport via FCInterNews, both players will be at Simone Inzaghi's disposal for the upcoming showdown at Giuseppe Meazza. The post Inter Handed Double Personnel Boost Ahead of Parma Encounter appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
